sqlMap.select: SELECT listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT memberid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, B.updateStatus, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS updatedate, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus, (case when commentStatus = 1 or shareStatus = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as totalstatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status <> '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
order by B.updatedate DESC, totalstatus DESC, A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#) )
WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status <> 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS enddate, A."option", A."content", CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.status confirmstatus, B.updateStatus, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus, A.companyId, (SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER F WHERE A.memberid = F.cn AND A.tenantid = F.tenant_id) as userImageFile FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.MEMBERID = C.CN LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT A.circularuserid, A.circularid, A.memberid, B.displayname as membername, B.displayname2 as membername2, A.status, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, A.updatestatus, A.updatedate, A.commentstatus, A.tenantid, B.cn, B.displayname, B.displayname2, B.mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
AND B.displayname LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
ORDER BY DECODE(A.memberid, (SELECT memberID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularid = #circularID#), 1, 2), A.memberid ASC

SELECT A.memberid, A.membername, A.membername2, B.title FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_BM B ON A.circularbmid = B.circularbmid WHERE A.circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT circularfileid, filesize, filename, filepath FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

select d.circularbmid, d.title, d.regDate, e.membername, d.memberNameCount from (SELECT A.circularbmid, A.title, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, (SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER B WHERE B.circularbmid = A.circularBMID) membernamecount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM A
WHERE A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# ) d join ( select c.circularBMID, c.membername from (SELECT circularBMID, membername FROM (SELECT row_number() over(Partition by circularbmid ORDER BY membername) as rNum, circularbmid, membername FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER B ) WHERE rNum = 1) c) e on e.circularbmid = d.circularbmid

SELECT A.circularbmid, A.memberid, CC.company, CC.description, NVL(CC.title, ' ') as title, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, A.membername, CC.mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BB.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BB.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ( SELECT D.CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.COMPANY ELSE D.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.TITLE ELSE D.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, D.MAIL, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.DESCRIPTION ELSE D.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END AS COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, b.mail, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#) BB ) CC ON A.memberid = CC.cn WHERE CC.CNT = '1' AND A.circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(circularid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE updatestatus = 1 AND circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, NVL(D.confirmtotalcount, '0') AS confirmtotalcount
FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.STATUS <> '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid <> #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
ORDER BY A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#) ) WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.STATUS <> '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid <> #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT DISTINCT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, B.status AS confirmstatus, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS updatedate, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, A.regdate as aRegdate
FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
order by A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#) ) WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)
SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status <> 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid = B.memberid AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.status <> 2 AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
order by A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#) ) WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)
SELECT circularfoldername FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE circularfolderid = #folderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS updatedate, NVL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.updatestatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE ((B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0)) AND B.memberID = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
order by A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#) ) WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE ((B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0)) AND B.memberID = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
AND A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
AND A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE memberid = #memberID#) B ON A.circularid = B.circularid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.circularfolderid = C.circularfolderid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.circularid = D.circularid AND D.memberid = #memberID# WHERE
B.circularfolderid = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND
D.updatestatus = '3' AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum FROM (SELECT distinct A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN A.membername ELSE A.membername2 END AS membername, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS regdate, d.status as confirmstatus, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.confirmdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ' ') AS confirmdate, D.updatestatus, NVL(E.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, F.confirmtotalcount, A.regdate as regg
FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE memberid = #memberID#) B ON A.circularid = B.circularid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.circularfolderid = C.circularfolderid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.circularid = D.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) E ON A.circularid = E.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, TO_CHAR(COUNT(decode(AA.memberID, BB.memberID, NULL, BB.circularid))) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY BB.circularid) F ON A.circularid = F.circularid WHERE
B.circularfolderid = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
A.membername2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' AND
TO_DATE(#sdate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#edate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(A.regdate , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND
D.memberid = #memberID# AND D.updatestatus = '3' AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#
ORDER BY IMPORTANCE CONFIRMSTATUS COMMENTSTATUS HASFILE TITLE MEMBERNAME REGDATE STATUS DESC
order by A.regdate DESC
)AAA WHERE rownum <= (#limit# + #rowCount#)
)
WHERE rNum >= (#limit# + 1)
SELECT filepath, filename FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND circularfileid = #circularFileID#
SELECT STATUS FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT cn AS memberid, displayname AS membername, displayname2 AS membername2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #memberID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 WHEN '6' THEN name6 END, ' ') name, width, colname FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LISTOPTION WHERE listtype = #listType# AND tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn

select.isEqual:
SELECT circularid, circularcommentid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, membername2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, status, tenantid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
circularcomment LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'

SELECT A.circularid, A.circularcommentid, A.circularuserid, A.circularcomment, A.memberid, A.membername, membername2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdate, A.status, B.status AS confirmStatus, A.tenantid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #circularUserID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
A.membername LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
A.circularcomment LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%'
ORDER BY B.updateDate DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT circularcommentstateid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE WHERE circularcommentid = #circularCommentID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT B.cn AS memberid, B.displayName AS membername, B.displayName2 AS membername2, B.mail AS mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.memberid = #memberID#
AND A.status = 0

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND ((status = 1 AND (circularuserid = #memberID# OR memberid = #memberID#)) OR (status = 0)) AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(B.circularcommentstateid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.status = 0 AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid AND A.companyid = B.companyid WHERE (B.status = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status <> 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status <> '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.memberid <> #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status <> 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #userID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #userID# AND B.deletestatus = 0) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) AS cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.status AS commentstatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(circularlinkid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_link WHERE circularfolderid = #folderID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, A.memberid, CC.displayname, CC.description, CC.company, CC.title, NVL(A.confirmdate, ' ') AS confirmdate, CC.DEPTID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT BB.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BB.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ( SELECT D.CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.COMPANY ELSE D.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.title ELSE D.title2 END AS title, D.MAIL, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN D.DESCRIPTION ELSE D.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, D.DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END AS COMPANY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN A.title ELSE A.title2 END AS title, b.mail, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, A.DEPTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# ) BB ) CC ON A.memberid = CC.cn AND CC.CNT = '1' WHERE A.CIRCULARID=#circularID# AND A.TENANTID=#tenantID# AND A.STATUS = '1' AND a.memberid <> ( SELECT memberId FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularId = #circularID# ) ORDER BY A.confirmdate desc ) WHERE rnum between #start#+1 and #perCount#+#start#

SELECT count(memberid) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A RIGHT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn WHERE A.CIRCULARID=#circularID# AND A.TENANTID=#tenantID# AND A.STATUS = '1' and A.TENANTID=B.tenant_id AND a.memberid <> ( SELECT memberId FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularId = #circularID# )

SELECT BB.department, BB.company FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ( SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as companyid, D.TENANT_ID, D.company FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.CN = #circularUserID# and D.tenant_id = #tenantID# and D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, A.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.TENANT_ID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #circularUserID# and A.tenant_id = #tenantID# and C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#) A ) BB WHERE BB.CNT = '1'
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR (circularid, title, importance, "option", "content", hasfile, status, memberid, membername, membername2, regdate, enddate, tenantid, companyID) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularid) is null then 1 else max(circularid)+1 end) from tbl_circular), #title#, #importance#, #option#, #content#, #hasFile#, #status#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #regDate#, #endDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
SELECT max(circularid) from tbl_circular

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_USER (circularuserid, circularid, memberid, membername, membername2, status, confirmdate, updatestatus, tenantid, companyid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularuserid) is null then 1 else max(circularuserid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_user) ,#circularID#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #status#, #confirmDate#, #updateStatus#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE (circularfileid, circularid, filename, filesize, filepath, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularfileID) is null then 1 else max(circularfileID)+1 end) from tbl_circular_file), #circularID#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #filePath#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION (circularoptionid, memberid, listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularOptionID) is null then 1 else max(circularOptionID)+1 end) from tbl_circular_option), #memberID#, #listCnt#, #isPreview#, #previewListValue#, #previewContentValue#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BM (circularbmid, title, memberid, regdate, tenantid, companyid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularbmid) is null then 1 else max(circularbmid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_bm), #title#, #userID#, #nowDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
SELECT max(circularBMid) from tbl_circular_bm

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER (circularbmuserid, circularbmid, memberid, membername, membername2, tenantid) SELECT (select (case when max(circularbmuserid) is null then 1 else max(circularbmuserid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_bmuser), #circularBMId#, cn, displayname, displayname2, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #memberID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION (circularoptionid, memberid, listcnt, ispreview, previewlistvalue, previewcontentvalue, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularoptionid) is null then 1 else max(circularoptionid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_option), #v_MEMBERID#, #v_LISTCOUNT#, #v_PREVIEW#, '50', '50', #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER (circularfolderid, circularfoldername, memberid, regdate, tenantid, companyid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularfolderid) is null then 1 else max(circularfolderid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_folder), #folderName#, #memberId#, #regDate#, #tenantId#, #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK (circularlinkid, circularfolderid, circularid, memberid, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularlinkid) is null then 1 else max(circularlinkid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_link), #folderId#, #circularId#, #memberId#, #tenantId#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT (circularcommentid, circularid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, membername2, regdate, status, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularcommentid) is null then 1 else max(circularcommentid)+1 end)from tbl_circular_comment), #circularID#, #circularUserID#, #circularComment#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #nowDate#, #status#, #tenantID#)
select max(circularcommentid) from tbl_circular_comment

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE (circularcommentstateid, circularcommentid, memberid, status, updateDate, tenantid) VALUES ((select (case when max(circularcommentstateid) is null then 1 else max(circularcommentstateid)+1 end) from tbl_circular_commentstate), #circularCommentID#, #memberID#, #status#, #nowDate#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET title = #title#, importance = #importance#, "option" = #option#, "content" = #content#, hasfile = #hasFile#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET listcnt = #v_LISTCOUNT#, ispreview = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND updatestatus = 0 AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET status = #status#, confirmdate = #confirmDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET listcnt = #listCnt#, ispreview = #isPreview#, previewlistvalue = #previewListValue#, previewcontentvalue = #previewContentValue# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND memberid = #memberID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 0 WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 2, previewlistvalue = #v_LIST#, previewcontentvalue = #v_CONTENT#, listcnt = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ispreview = 1, previewlistvalue = #v_LIST#, previewcontentvalue = #v_CONTENT#, listcnt = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE tenantid = #v_TENANTID# AND memberid = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_BM SET title = #title#, regdate = #nowDate# WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID# AND memberid = #userID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET status = '1', endDate = #endDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER SET circularfoldername = #folderName#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularfolderid = #folderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = '2' WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid IN (' ', #memberID#) AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = #updateStatus# WHERE circularid = #circularId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK SET circularfolderid = #folderId# WHERE circularid = #circularId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT B.status as updatestatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B WHERE B.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#)) WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET commentStatus = #commentStatus#, shareStatus = #commentStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
updatedate = null
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE SET status = #status#, confirmDate = #nowDate# WHERE circularcommentid IN (SELECT circularCommentID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# ) AND status = 0 AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE SET status = #status#, updateDate = #nowDate# WHERE circularcommentid = #circularCommentID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET shareStatus = #shareStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
updatedate = null
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET deletestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #userID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET title = #title#, importance = #importance#, "option" = #option#, "content" = #content#, hasfile = #hasFile#, status = #status#, regdate = #regDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET status = 0 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND updatestatus = 0 AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET deletestatus = 0, updatestatus = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT decode((SELECT COUNT(circularID) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#) , 0, (SELECT status FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#), 3) from dual )) WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE circularbmid = #circularBMId# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE circularfolderid = #deleteFolderId# AND memberid = #memberId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE WHERE circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
